_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.
_label_tier_note: EU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

must_detect.matched_text:
Cross‑border transfer: Vendor Arcadia Data Processors Ltd. (Maurasia) receives only aggregated, de-identified ESG metrics under SCCs; transfer impact assessment indicates low residual risk; contact: privacy-office@arxion-energies.example.
Identifiers listed in the archive (ISIN: ZZ-ARX-123456; LEI: ARXIONLEI-000000-TEST) are placeholders and do not correspond to live instruments.
Market context: The CEE Regulated Market has published updated guidance on disclosure timing aligning with MAR Article 17; we follow standard immediate disclosure for inside information and delay only under documented conditions.
Public/stale information: Logistics updates for the Northport terminal and routine maintenance outages at Wind Hub Delta were posted on the company website on 03 Mar 2026 and do not relate to price‑sensitive matters.
PDMR dealings pre‑clearance continues under the existing Dealing Code; no selective analyst briefings are planned, and any Q&A will rely solely on information already in the public domain.
Intended announcement calendar (public): AGM notice uploaded on 10 Apr 2026; dividend timetable confirmed on the exchange bulletin board on 17 Apr 2026; no changes since.
Insider lists: The insider list template and event-based sections are maintained in line with MAR, with role‑based entries (no personal emails or phone numbers), and archived in the compliance vault.
Positive control item — do not circulate externally: The closed period under Article 19(11) MAR will run for PDMRs for 30 days prior to the planned (not yet public) interim results announcement on 28 Oct 2026; trading by PDMRs and closely associated persons is prohibited during this window.
For avoidance of doubt, the draft term sheet for the green loan refinancing remains in negotiation and contains no pricing or volume terms; it is not inside information at this stage.
